objective: Add mostConnectedNode() pure helper to graph.ts and extend carto stats CLI to show most connected node title and degree
key_changes: - Added mostConnectedNode(graph) returns { node: Node | null, degree: number } in src/store/graph.ts
- Returns { node: null, degree: 0 } sentinel when no edges exist
- Counts bidirectional degree - each edge contributes +1 to both nodes regardless of direction
- Tie-breaking uses first-encountered node in graph.nodes array order
- carto stats CLI extended to print most connected node (e.g. 'Most connected: Alpha (degree 2)')
- Falls back to '(no edges)' when degrees are zero
- Added 4 vitest tests: no-edges sentinel, bidirectional degree, first-encountered tie-break, empty graph
- CLI extension works with existing graph files (no migration required)
